cases.title: PATHD partial payload remains inspectable
cases.claim: A partial pathway graph is shown as workbench context with its tier visible.

input.notes: Exploratory payload only; no formal downstream claim is made.

expected.rationale: Partial payload visibility is allowed when provenance and evidence context are present.

cases.title: FBASim partial export with provenance
cases.claim: A single-species FBA table is exported as partial decision-support data.

input.notes: The export is finalized and carries source provenance.

expected.rationale: Partial export is acceptable when it is not draft and includes provenance.

cases.title: CatDes partial recommendation with evidence
cases.claim: A catalyst ranking is surfaced as a partial recommendation with assumptions attached.

input.notes: The recommendation remains framed as computational decision support.

expected.rationale: Partial recommendation is allowed when evidence and provenance are present.

cases.title: DynCon partial payload with bounded uncertainty
cases.claim: A control trajectory is shown in the workbench with bounded uncertainty.

input.notes: The payload is not being converted into an external claim.

expected.rationale: Partial payloads with bounded uncertainty remain visible.

cases.title: DBTLflow partial protocol after human review
cases.claim: A DBTL protocol-like artifact is available after provenance and human review.

input.notes: Human review is already satisfied for this corpus case.

expected.rationale: Protocol-like use is acceptable for partial output when provenance and human review are present.

cases.title: SCSPATIAL partial external handoff after review
cases.claim: A spatial analysis summary is handed off externally with review and provenance.

input.notes: The handoff is marked as reviewed and traceable.

expected.rationale: External handoff can proceed when partial validity, provenance, and human review are present.

cases.title: ProEvol partial campaign export
cases.claim: A protein evolution campaign table is exported as modeled decision support.

input.notes: The file is not presented as measured wet-lab selection.

expected.rationale: Partial export is allowed with provenance and honest framing.

cases.title: GenMIM partial recommendation with provenance
cases.claim: A CRISPRi minimization schedule is recommended as partial computational guidance.

input.notes: The recommendation carries computational assumptions.

expected.rationale: Partial recommendations can be surfaced when traceable and bounded.

cases.title: CETHX demo payload remains demo-only
cases.claim: A demo thermodynamics payload is visible only as exploratory output.

input.notes: The payload is not converted into a formal thermodynamic claim.

expected.rationale: Demo payloads may remain visible but must stay clearly demo-only.

cases.title: CellFree demo payload remains demo-only
cases.claim: A demo cell-free result is displayed as exploratory context only.

input.notes: The result is not promoted into a protocol-like artifact.

expected.rationale: Demo payload visibility is allowed only as demo-only context.

cases.title: MultiO demo payload remains demo-only
cases.claim: A demo multi-omics integration output is shown without external claims.

input.notes: The output stays inside the workbench as demo context.

expected.rationale: Demo outputs may be visible but should not become formal claims.

cases.title: CETHX demo recommendation is blocked
cases.claim: A demo thermodynamics output is treated as a pathway recommendation.

input.notes: The surface is stronger than demo output should support.

expected.rationale: Demo-tier outputs should not become formal recommendations.

cases.title: CellFree demo protocol is blocked
cases.claim: A demo cell-free result is converted into a protocol-like artifact.

input.notes: Protocol-like consumption is stricter than payload display.

expected.rationale: Demo-tier output cannot become a protocol-like artifact.

cases.title: MultiO demo external handoff is blocked
cases.claim: A demo multi-omics result is handed off to an external consumer.

input.notes: The output leaves the workbench despite demo validity.

expected.rationale: Demo-tier outputs should not be external handoffs.

cases.title: Community FBASim demo recommendation is blocked
cases.claim: A community-mode FBA demo exchange table is treated as a formal recommendation.

input.notes: Community exchange values are demo-tier and not formal recommendation material.

expected.rationale: Demo-tier recommendation use is blocked.

cases.title: PATHD demo export is blocked
cases.claim: A demo pathway layout is exported as reusable route evidence.

input.notes: The export surface is stronger than a demo route can support.

expected.rationale: Demo-tier output should not become an exportable formal artifact.

cases.title: NEXAI recommendation missing evidence is blocked
cases.claim: A research answer is used as a recommendation without traceable evidence.

input.notes: The answer lacks evidence trace for recommendation use.

expected.rationale: Recommendation surfaces require traceable provenance.

cases.title: PATHD export missing provenance is blocked
cases.claim: A pathway export is created without a run provenance snapshot.

input.notes: The evidence may exist, but the export cannot trace the run.

expected.rationale: Exports require provenance even when evidence is otherwise present.

cases.title: SCSPATIAL external handoff missing provenance is blocked
cases.claim: A spatial analysis bundle is handed off without provenance.

input.notes: Human review does not replace missing provenance.

expected.rationale: External handoff requires provenance.

cases.title: CatDes recommendation missing provenance is blocked
cases.claim: A catalyst recommendation is shown without provenance.

input.notes: Recommendation consumers need source traceability.

expected.rationale: Recommendation surfaces require provenance.

cases.title: ProEvol export missing provenance is blocked
cases.claim: A campaign export is created without provenance.

input.notes: The campaign table cannot be traced to a run.

expected.rationale: Exports require provenance to avoid context-free reuse.

cases.title: GenMIM recommendation missing evidence is blocked
cases.claim: A minimization schedule is recommended after evidence was dropped.

input.notes: The recommendation has neither evidence nor run provenance.

expected.rationale: Missing traceability blocks recommendation use.

cases.title: GECAIR export missing provenance is blocked
cases.claim: A gene circuit export is created without provenance.

input.notes: The exported circuit needs a traceable source.

expected.rationale: Exports require source provenance.

cases.title: Metabolic-eng export missing provenance is blocked
cases.claim: A legacy metabolic-eng route export is created without provenance.

input.notes: The alias route must still preserve traceability.

expected.rationale: Alias outputs require provenance on export surfaces.

cases.title: FBASim unresolved uncertainty gates recommendation
cases.claim: An FBA output with unresolved uncertainty is turned into a recommendation.

input.notes: The uncertainty state is not bounded for recommendation use.

expected.rationale: Unresolved uncertainty requires human review before recommendation use.

cases.title: CatDes unresolved uncertainty gates external handoff
cases.claim: A catalyst design handoff has unresolved scoring uncertainty.

input.notes: The handoff leaves the workbench before uncertainty review.

expected.rationale: External handoff with unresolved uncertainty requires human gate.

cases.title: DynCon unresolved uncertainty gates recommendation
cases.claim: A control recommendation is made while stability uncertainty remains unresolved.

input.notes: The recommendation needs review of unresolved control uncertainty.

expected.rationale: Unresolved uncertainty gates recommendation use.

cases.title: ProEvol unresolved uncertainty gates export
cases.claim: A campaign export is finalized before uncertainty review.

input.notes: The modeled campaign uncertainty is unresolved.

expected.rationale: Unresolved uncertainty should require review before export.

cases.title: GenMIM unresolved uncertainty gates recommendation
cases.claim: A minimization recommendation is made while viability uncertainty is unresolved.

input.notes: The target schedule has unresolved viability uncertainty.

expected.rationale: Human gate is required before recommendation use.

cases.title: GECAIR unresolved uncertainty gates export
cases.claim: A circuit export is created while parameter uncertainty remains unresolved.

input.notes: The circuit parameter uncertainty is not bounded.

expected.rationale: Unresolved uncertainty requires human review before export.

cases.title: SCSPATIAL unresolved uncertainty gates recommendation
cases.claim: A spatial-cluster recommendation is made before uncertainty is resolved.

input.notes: The clustering or spatial metadata uncertainty remains unresolved.

expected.rationale: Recommendation use requires review when uncertainty is unresolved.

cases.title: PATHD unresolved uncertainty gates external handoff
cases.claim: A pathway route is handed off externally before route uncertainty is resolved.

input.notes: The route is not ready for external consumption without review.

expected.rationale: External handoff with unresolved uncertainty requires human review.

cases.title: DBTL protocol requires human gate
cases.claim: A DBTL protocol is generated before required human review.

input.notes: The policy declares human review for protocol-like surfaces.

expected.rationale: Protocol surface requires human gate before use.

cases.title: SCSPATIAL external handoff requires human gate
cases.claim: A spatial analysis handoff is attempted before human review.

input.notes: External consumers require a reviewed handoff.

expected.rationale: External handoff requires human gate.

cases.title: FBASim external handoff requires human gate
cases.claim: A flux table is handed off externally before review.

input.notes: The handoff is traceable but not reviewed.

expected.rationale: Human gate is required for external handoff.

cases.title: PATHD external handoff requires human gate
cases.claim: A pathway route handoff is attempted before review.

input.notes: The route is not reviewed for outside use.

expected.rationale: External handoff requires human gate.

cases.title: CatDes protocol requires human gate
cases.claim: A catalyst design is turned into a protocol-like artifact before review.

input.notes: The protocol-like surface requires review.

expected.rationale: Protocol-like output requires human gate.

cases.title: ProEvol external handoff requires human gate
cases.claim: A campaign recommendation package is handed off externally before review.

input.notes: The modeled campaign output requires review for external use.

expected.rationale: External handoff requires human gate.

cases.title: GenMIM protocol requires human gate
cases.claim: A minimization plan is used as protocol-like instruction before review.

input.notes: Protocol-like use requires review even for partial output.

expected.rationale: Human gate is required before protocol-like use.

cases.title: Metabolic-eng external handoff requires human gate
cases.claim: A legacy metabolic-eng route handoff is attempted before review.

input.notes: Alias status does not remove external review needs.

expected.rationale: External handoff requires human gate.

cases.title: Community FBA fake exchange recommendation
cases.claim: Community FBA fake exchange values are treated as a formal engineering recommendation.

input.notes: Community exchange is not a joint community LP result.

expected.rationale: Demo community exchange values cannot become formal recommendations.

cases.title: CETHX fake dG prime feasibility claim
cases.claim: CETHX demo delta G prime output is treated as real thermodynamic feasibility.

input.notes: The thermodynamics output is demo-tier and should not become a real claim.

expected.rationale: Demo thermodynamics should not become a real feasibility recommendation.

cases.title: Stringly DBTL loop-back treated as typed learning
cases.claim: A legacy stringly learned-parameter loop-back is treated as typed learning.

input.notes: Typed DBTL feedback is required before loop-back decisions.

expected.rationale: Loop-back learning requires typed feedback and human review.

cases.title: Draft DBTL protocol export
cases.claim: A draft DBTL protocol is exported as if finalized.

input.notes: Draft state should block protocol-like export.

expected.rationale: Draft protocol-like artifacts should not be exported.

cases.title: Demo MultiO external handoff
cases.claim: A demo MultiO output is used as an external handoff.

input.notes: Demo multi-omics output cannot leave as a formal claim.

expected.rationale: Demo output is blocked from external handoff.

cases.title: Missing provenance export
cases.claim: A pathway export is produced without provenance.

input.notes: Formal exports must remain traceable.

expected.rationale: Missing provenance blocks export.

cases.title: Demo CellFree protocol-like artifact
cases.claim: A demo CellFree result is used as a protocol-like artifact.

input.notes: Demo CellFree output should remain exploratory.

expected.rationale: Demo output cannot generate protocol-like artifacts.

cases.title: NEXAI missing evidence recommendation
cases.claim: A NEXAI answer with missing evidence is used as a recommendation.

input.notes: The answer lacks evidence trace needed for recommendation use.

expected.rationale: Missing evidence trace blocks recommendation use.

cases.title: PATHD draft export is blocked
cases.claim: A draft pathway graph is exported as reusable evidence.

input.notes: Draft state should prevent export.

expected.rationale: Draft outputs are not exportable formal artifacts.

cases.title: FBASim draft export is blocked
cases.claim: A draft flux table is exported before finalization.

input.notes: The output has not been finalized.

expected.rationale: Draft export should be blocked.

cases.title: CatDes draft export is blocked
cases.claim: A draft catalyst ranking is exported before finalization.

input.notes: The ranking remains a draft workbench state.

expected.rationale: Draft catalyst outputs are not exportable.

cases.title: ProEvol draft export is blocked
cases.claim: A draft campaign table is exported before review.

input.notes: The campaign artifact is still draft.

expected.rationale: Draft campaign exports should be blocked.

cases.title: DBTL draft protocol is blocked
cases.claim: A draft DBTL protocol-like output is consumed as protocol.

input.notes: The protocol-like artifact is not finalized.

expected.rationale: Draft protocol-like outputs are not exportable or consumable.

cases.title: GenMIM draft export is blocked
cases.claim: A draft CRISPRi schedule is exported before finalization.

input.notes: The schedule is still draft.

expected.rationale: Draft schedules should not be exported.

cases.title: SCSPATIAL draft export is blocked
cases.claim: A draft spatial analysis export is created before finalization.

input.notes: The analysis output has not been finalized.

expected.rationale: Draft analysis export should be blocked.

cases.title: Metabolic-eng draft export is blocked
cases.claim: A draft legacy route export is created before finalization.

input.notes: The alias route output is still draft.

expected.rationale: Draft alias exports should be blocked.
